why: Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound minecraft:disconnect must dispatch from the official framed packet id to a disconnect reason decoder through Stevenarella packet_by_id. This is packet framing/dispatch/decode evidence for one official empty literal Component reason fixture only and is separate from UI disconnect handling, screen flow, Configuration completion, registry hydration, Play entry, or runtime behavior.
what: The Rust oracle test configuration_disconnect_clientbound_framed_dispatch_matches_official_oracle_answer panics while exercising packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Configuration, Direction::Clientbound, packet id 2, official body bytes) because v26_1_2.rs does not map Configuration clientbound packet id 0x02.

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: Component.literal(String), ClientboundDisconnectPacket(Component), ClientboundDisconnectPacket.STREAM_CODEC, ConfigurationProtocols.CLIENTBOUND.codec().encode/decode(ClientboundDisconnectPacket), ConfigurationProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), ClientboundDisconnectPacket.reason(), and Component.getString().
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Configuration clientbound disconnect dispatch/decode.

Current Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound mapping contains cookie_request id 0x00, custom_payload id 0x01, finish_configuration id 0x03, keep_alive id 0x04, and ping id 0x05, but not disconnect id 0x02.

observed_failure: bad packet id 0x2 in Clientbound Configuration; Stevenarella panicked while dispatching official Configuration clientbound disconnect packet id 2
